/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/VariationalFracture_original.dir/drivers/VariationalFracture_original.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VariationalFracture_original.dir/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/software/mfemplus/custombilininteg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VariationalFracture_original.dir/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/software/mfemplus/customlininteg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VariationalFracture_original.dir/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/software/mfemplus/customfunctions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VariationalFracture_original.dir/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/software/mfemplus/customoperators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VariationalFracture_original.dir/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/software/mfemplus/computequantities.cpp.o -o VariationalFracture_original   -L/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/projects/VariationalFracture/../../software/mfem/build  -L/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/projects/VariationalFracture/../../software/hypre/src/lib  -L/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/projects/VariationalFracture/../../software/metis-5.1.0/lib/libmetis  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/petsc/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/slepc/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/projects/VariationalFracture/../../software/mfem/build -Wl,-rpath,/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/projects/VariationalFracture/../../software/hypre/src/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/Aashutosh/Academic/Software/MFEM/projects/VariationalFracture/../../software/metis-5.1.0/lib/libmetis -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/petsc/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/slepc/lib -lmfem -lpthread -ldl -lHYPRE -lmetis -lpetsc -lslepc /opt/homebrew/lib/libadios2_cxx_mpi.2.11.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libadios2_cxx.2.11.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/open-mpi/5.0.9/lib/libmpi.dylib
